text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF announced that more than 1,900 alleged Hezbollah members have been killed in Lebanon since hostilities escalated in March. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，自三月份敌对行动升级以来，已有超过1900名涉嫌真主党成员在黎巴嫩被击毙。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released footage of FPV drone strikes targeting a group of IDF troops recovering a disabled tank in southern Lebanon, followed by a failed strike on the rescue force afterward. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Kan: An Israeli Air Force investigation into yesterday’s Hezbollah drone strike in Lebanon found that two rescue helicopters were on the ground extracting wounded soldiers. The first evacuated three casualties within 34 seconds. The second was on the ground for only 24 seconds when an explosive drone struck nearby. Pilots decided to take off immediately without rear clearance. A third helicopter was scrambled to evacuate the wounded from a waypoint. No damage was found to the second helicopter. The IDF is seeking solutions to the relatively new drone threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党发布了FPV无人机袭击的画面，目标是一群在黎巴嫩南部回收受损坦克的以色列国防军士兵，随后对救援部队的袭击未果。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Kan：以色列空军对昨天真主党在黎巴嫩发动的无人机袭击进行的调查发现，当时有两架救援直升机在地面撤离受伤士兵。第一架在34秒内撤离了三名伤员。第二架在地面仅停留了24秒，附近就遭到了爆炸无人机的袭击。飞行员决定在没有后方许可的情况下立即起飞。第三架直升机被紧急调派从航点撤离伤员。第二架直升机未发现受损。以色列国防军正在寻求应对这一相对较新的无人机威胁的解决方案。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Two Israeli sources told the network that the Lebanese government has not taken a single step against Hezbollah since the ceasefire began two weeks ago. “There were no arrests, no attempts to prevent attacks on soldiers, and no attempt…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 i24NEWS: Approximately 10 drones were launched at Israeli forces in southern Lebanon over the past 24 hours. A senior battlefield official said: “This is a bit of a surprise.” Another senior security official currently in Lebanon told i24: “We were not well prepared for this threat – only at the beginning of the campaign did we establish exercises to deal with the drones.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 i24NEWS：两名以色列消息人士告诉该媒体，自两周前停火开始以来，黎巴嫩政府没有对真主党采取任何行动。‘没有逮捕，没有试图阻止对士兵的袭击，也没有尝试……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 i24NEWS：过去24小时内，约有10架无人机向黎巴嫩南部的以色列军队发射。一位高级战场官员表示：‘这有点令人惊讶。’另一位目前在黎巴嫩的高级安全官员告诉i24：‘我们对这种威胁准备不足——我们只是在行动开始时才建立了应对无人机的演习。’ @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Two Israeli sources told the network that the Lebanese government has not taken a single step against Hezbollah since the ceasefire began two weeks ago. “There were no arrests, no attempts to prevent attacks on soldiers, and no attempt to prevent shooting,” one source said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：两名以色列消息人士告诉该媒体，自两周前停火开始以来，黎巴嫩政府没有对真主党采取任何行动。一位消息人士说：‘没有逮捕，没有试图阻止对士兵的袭击，也没有尝试阻止射击。’ @wfwitness

text: Germany's Merz on Iran: The U.S. and Israel assumed at the very beginning that this problem could be solved within a few days. But today we must acknowledge: it has not been solved. That is why we, from the European side, are also seeking a diplomatic solution. I hope that we succeed, but I am not certain.
text_zh: 德国的默茨谈伊朗：美国和以色列最初认为这个问题可以在几天内解决。但今天我们必须承认：它没有得到解决。这就是为什么我们欧洲方面也在寻求外交解决方案。我希望我们能成功，但我并不确定。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Baqaei alleges that the EU’s sanctions against Iran were never about human rights violations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 伊朗外交部发言人巴盖里声称，欧盟对伊朗的制裁从来都不是为了人权问题。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱Multiple polls following the merger of Naftali Bennett and Yair Lapid into the “Together” party show a tight race. A Mano Geva poll for Channel 12 gives Together - led by Bennet 26, Likud 25, Eisenkot 15. A Direct Poll for i24NEWS gives Likud 33, Together…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇶🇦 i24NEWS: Former IDF chief of staff and head of the “Yashar” list, Gadi Eisenkot, reportedly received a 100,000 shekel "guarantee" from lawyer Yossi Benkel, who has represented Qatari banks and a charity active in Gaza, even after 7 October. Benkel also advised the IDF on hostage issues. Benkel said: “I do not represent the State of Qatar or its affiliated bodies. There is no connection between my legal clients and my desire to help shape the proper leadership of the State of Israel.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱 在纳夫塔利·贝内特和亚伊尔·拉皮德合并组建‘在一起’党后，多项民调显示竞争激烈。Mano Geva为第12频道进行的民调显示，由贝内特领导的‘在一起’党获得26席，利库德集团25席，艾森科特15席。Direct Poll为i24NEWS进行的民调显示，利库德集团33席，‘在一起’党……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇶🇦 i24NEWS：据报道，前以色列国防军总参谋长、“Yashar”名单负责人加迪·艾森科特从律师约西·本克尔那里获得了10万谢克尔的“担保”。本克尔曾代表卡塔尔银行和一家在加沙活动的慈善机构，即使在10月7日之后也是如此。本克尔还曾就人质问题向以色列国防军提供建议。本克尔表示：‘我不代表卡塔尔国或其附属机构。我的法律客户与我希望帮助塑造以色列国适当领导层的愿望之间没有任何联系。’ @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Multiple polls following the merger of Naftali Bennett and Yair Lapid into the “Together” party show a tight race. A Mano Geva poll for Channel 12 gives Together - led by Bennet 26, Likud 25, Eisenkot 15. A Direct Poll for i24NEWS gives Likud 33, Together 24. The Netanyahu bloc stands between 50‑62 seats depending on the poll. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在纳夫塔利·贝内特和亚伊尔·拉皮德合并组建“在一起”党后，多项民调显示竞争激烈。Mano Geva为第12频道进行的民调显示，由贝内特领导的“在一起”党获得26席，利库德集团25席，艾森科特15席。Direct Poll为i24NEWS进行的民调显示，利库德集团33席，“在一起”党24席。根据民调的不同，内塔尼亚胡阵营的席位在50到62席之间。 @wfwitness

text: Ukrainian FPV drone hits a building moments after Russian troops entered.
text_zh: 乌克兰FPV无人机在俄罗斯军队进入后不久击中了一栋建筑物。

text: 🇺🇸 Donald Trump is angry at unfunny comedians. 🤷‍♂️ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普对那些一点也不好笑的喜剧演员感到愤怒。🤷‍♂️ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio rejected Iran’s conditions for opening the Strait of Hormuz, following U.S. President Trump’s cancellation of planned talks in Islamabad. “If what they (Iran) mean by ‘opening the straits’ is: ‘Yes, the straits are…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: Iran has signalled through regional mediators that they aim to retain control over the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥拒绝了伊朗关于开放霍尔木兹海峡的条件，此前美国总统特朗普取消了原定在伊斯兰堡举行的会谈。“如果他们（伊朗）所说的‘开放海峡’是指：‘是的，海峡是……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：伊朗已通过地区调解人发出信号，表示他们旨在保留对霍尔木兹海峡的控制权。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇩🇪 ⚡️ German Chancellor Friedrich Merz says Iran is humiliating the United States. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇩🇪 ⚡️ 德国总理弗里德里希·默茨表示，伊朗正在羞辱美国。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Trump: Wow, Jimmy Kimmel, who is in no way funny as attested to by his terrible Television Ratings, made a statement on his Show that is really shocking. He showed a fake video of the First Lady, Melania, and our son, Barron, like they were actually sitting in his studio, listening to him speak, which they weren’t, and never would be. He then stated, “Our First Lady, Melania, is here. Look at Melania, so beautiful. Mrs. Trump, you have a glow like an expectant widow." A day later a lunatic tried entering the ballroom of the White House Correspondents Dinner, loaded up with a shotgun, handgun, and many knives. He was there for a very obvious and sinister reason. I appreciate that so many people are incensed by Kimmel’s despicable call to violence, and normally would not be responsive to anything that he said but, this is something far beyond the pale. Jimmy Kimmel should be immediately fired by Disney and ABC. Thank you for your attention to this matter!
text_zh: 特朗普：哇，吉米·坎摩尔，正如他糟糕的电视收视率所证明的那样，他一点也不好笑。他在节目中发表了一番非常令人震惊的言论。他展示了一段第一夫人梅拉尼娅和我们儿子巴伦的虚假视频，就好像他们真的坐在他的演播室里听他说话一样，而事实并非如此，也永远不会是这样。然后他说：“我们的第一夫人梅拉尼娅在这里。看梅拉尼娅，真漂亮。特朗普夫人，你有一种准寡妇般的光彩。”一天后，一个疯子试图闯入白宫记者协会晚宴的宴会厅，身上装满了霰弹枪、手枪和许多刀具。他去那里有一个非常明显且险恶的原因。我很感激有这么多人对坎摩尔卑劣的暴力呼吁感到愤怒，通常我不会对他说的话做出回应，但这已经远远超出了底线。迪士尼和美国广播公司（ABC）应该立即解雇吉米·坎摩尔。感谢您对此事的关注！

text: 🇮🇷 🛸 💥 🇮🇱 Hezbollah FPV drone strike on a group of IOF soldiers trying to recover a disabled tank in southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🛸 💥 🇮🇱 真主党FPV无人机袭击了一群试图在黎巴嫩南部回收一辆受损坦克的以色列国防军士兵。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

He showed a fake video of the First Lady, Melania, and our son, Barron, like they were actually sitting in his studio, listening to him speak, which they weren’t, and never would be. He then stated, “Our First Lady, Melania, is here. Look at Melania, so beautiful. Mrs. Trump, you have a glow like an expectant widow.” A day later a lunatic tried entering the ballroom of the White House Correspondents Dinner, loaded up with a shotgun, handgun, and many knives. He was there for a very obvious and sinister reason. I appreciate that so many people are incensed by Kimmel’s despicable call to violence, and normally would not be responsive to anything that he said but, this is something far beyond the pale. Jimmy Kimmel should be immediately fired by Disney and ABC. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：哇，吉米·坎摩尔，正如他糟糕的电视收视率所证明的那样，他一点也不好笑。他在节目中发表了一番非常令人震惊的言论。他展示了一段第一夫人梅拉尼娅和我们儿子巴伦的虚假视频，就好像他们真的坐在他的演播室里听他说话一样，而事实并非如此，也永远不会是这样。然后他说：“我们的第一夫人梅拉尼娅在这里。看梅拉尼娅，真漂亮。特朗普夫人，你有一种准寡妇般的光彩。”一天后，一个疯子试图闯入白宫记者协会晚宴的宴会厅，身上装满了霰弹枪、手枪和许多刀具。他去那里有一个非常明显且险恶的原因。我很感激有这么多人对坎摩尔卑劣的暴力呼吁感到愤怒，通常我不会对他说的话做出回应，但这已经远远超出了底线。迪士尼和美国广播公司（ABC）应该立即解雇吉米·坎摩尔。感谢您对此事的关注！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统推文

text: OSINTdefender Per White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt, no update to the press on the status of U.S. mine-clearing operations in the Strait of Hormuz. Questions on the matter were referred to the Department of War. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048817466726363198/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据白宫新闻秘书卡罗琳·莱维特称，没有向媒体更新美国在霍尔木兹海峡扫雷行动的最新情况。有关此事的提问被转交给了战争部。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048817466726363198/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel's army chief: 2026 "likely to be a year of fighting" on all fronts. - AFP https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048817156414910796/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列军队参谋长：2026年“很可能是各条战线战斗的一年”。 - 法新社 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048817156414910796/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel White House: We should have fierce disagreement, but this should be peaceful. Not bullets tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 白宫：我们应该有激烈的争论，但这应该是和平的。不是子弹 推文

text: Open Source Intel White House: Trump is fearless; he is willing to put his own life on the line https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048816323124199744/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 白宫：特朗普无所畏惧；他愿意拿自己的生命去冒险 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048816323124199744/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel White House: This is the third major assassination attempt against Trump in two years. No other president in history has faced such repeated serious attempts on his life. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048815974137135196/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 白宫：这是两年内针对特朗普的第三次重大暗杀企图。历史上没有任何其他总统面临过如此反复的严重生命威胁。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048815974137135196/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Rubio says Iran's internal power struggle is intensifying, saying the Supreme Leader "has not been seen visibly, publicly, has not spoken, we have not heard his voice." "The hardliners with an apocalyptic vision of the future have the ultimate power in that country. I think it's pronounced now that you have a supreme leader whose credibility is still untested, whose access is questionable." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 鲁比奥表示伊朗内部的权力斗争正在加剧，称最高领袖“没有公开露面，没有说话，我们没有听到他的声音”。“那些对未来抱有末日愿景的强硬派在该国拥有最终权力。我认为现在很明显，你有一位最高领袖，其信誉仍未经过考验，其准入权限也存在疑问。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel White House: Trump's calm in the face of chaos, while yet another individual was trying to take his life, was really remarkable to witness. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048815068825911741/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 白宫：特朗普在混乱面前的冷静，尽管另一个人试图夺走他的生命，这确实令人惊叹。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048815068825911741/video/1 推文

text_zh: 开源情报 白宫：特勤局特工胸部中弹，但被防弹背心救了一命 推文

text: Open Source Intel White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt returned to give a briefing while on maternity leave, saying she felt it was her duty following the recent assassination attempt on President Trump. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048813366504776110/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 白宫新闻秘书卡罗琳·莱维特在产假期间回来进行简报，称在最近针对特朗普总统的暗杀企图发生后，她觉得这是她的职责。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048813366504776110/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - White House's Leavitt: "The deranged lies and smears against the President, his family, his supporters, have lead crazy people to believe crazy things. And they are inspired to commit violence because of those words. It has to stop!" https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048812922210512943/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 白宫的莱维特：“针对总统、他的家人和他的支持者的疯狂谎言和诽谤，导致疯狂的人相信疯狂的事情。他们因为这些言论而受到鼓舞去实施暴力。这必须停止！” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048812922210512943/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref: "Once, to cripple the Iranian nation, they withheld fuel sales to our airplanes. Today, those same countries have come to the negotiating table with Iran to sustain their own energy lifelines. This is the fruit of steadfastness; we have advanced from 'sanction vulnerability' to the stage of 'authority in meeting global needs.'" tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗副总统穆罕默德·礼萨·阿雷夫：“曾经，为了削弱伊朗民族，他们拒绝向我们的飞机出售燃料。今天，那些国家为了维持自己的能源生命线，已经与伊朗坐到了谈判桌前。这是坚定的果实；我们已经从‘制裁脆弱性’阶段迈向了‘满足全球需求的能力’阶段。” 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt, immediately following the shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner, U.S. President Donald J. Trump spoke with the U.S. Secret Service agent that was shot in the chest to make sure he was okay. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048811905402212368/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据新闻秘书卡罗琳·莱维特称，在白宫记者协会晚宴发生枪击事件后，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普立即与胸部中弹的美国特勤局特工交谈，以确保他没事。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048811905402212368/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Qatar has ended its two-decade relationship with Hamas and will no longer serve as host or mediator for the group, according to sources. Most of Hamas' political leadership has already departed the country. The decision followed Hamas' delayed and weak response to Iranian strikes on Qatari territory during Operation Roaring Lion. Turkey is in early discussions to potentially offer the group a new base of operations. @AmitSegal tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据消息人士称，卡塔尔已结束与哈马斯长达二十年的关系，将不再担任该组织的东道主或调解人。哈马斯的大部分政治领导层已经离开该国。这一决定是在哈马斯对伊朗在“咆哮狮子”行动期间袭击卡塔尔领土的反应迟缓且软弱之后做出的。土耳其正在进行初步讨论，可能为该组织提供一个新的行动基地。 @AmitSegal 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 ⚡️ Iran's FM Abbas Araghchi Shares Vladimir Putin's Praise: "The whole world is now admiring the Iranian people for their resistance against the United States and their victory in this unequal and unjust war" Video translation: Ryan Rozbiani 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇮🇷 🇷🇺 ⚡️ 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐分享了弗拉基米尔·普京的赞扬：“全世界现在都在钦佩伊朗人民对美国的抵抗，以及他们在这一不平等和不公正战争中的胜利。” 视频翻译：Ryan Rozbiani 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu told an IDF senior command conference that Israel has “freedom of action to thwart immediate and emerging threats” in Lebanon. “We are striking in the security zone and also north of the Litani,” he said. He noted…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir told an IDF senior command conference that Israel is still in a multi‑arena campaign. The military has established forward defence zones in front of communities in Gaza, Syria and Lebanon, and will remain there until long‑term security is guaranteed. Zamir said unprecedented achievements were reached in Iran, removing existential threats as they were forming, in a joint and synchronised campaign with the U.S. military. Fighting in Lebanon continues and will not stop until northern communities are secure. Three negotiations are under way, led by the political echelon, in Iran, Lebanon and Gaza. He said that the phenomenon of looting, if it exists, is despicable, and personnel will not use social media to spread controversial messages or for self‑promotion. “The year 2026 may continue to be a year of fighting on every one of the fronts,” he added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡在以色列国防军高级指挥会议上表示，以色列在黎巴嫩拥有‘挫败即时和新出现威胁的行动自由’。他说：‘我们正在安全区以及利塔尼河以北进行打击。’ 他指出……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔中将在以色列国防军高级指挥会议上表示，以色列仍处于多战线行动中。军方已在加沙、叙利亚和黎巴嫩的社区前建立了前沿防御区，并将留在那里直到长期安全得到保障。扎米尔表示，在与美国军方联合且同步的行动中，伊朗取得了前所未有的成就，消除了正在形成的生存威胁。黎巴嫩的战斗仍在继续，在北部社区安全之前不会停止。在政治层面的领导下，伊朗、黎巴嫩和加沙正在进行三场谈判。他表示，掠夺现象如果存在，是卑鄙的，人员不得利用社交媒体传播有争议的信息或进行自我宣传。他补充说：“2026年可能仍将是各条战线持续战斗的一年。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 Reuters: NATO is considering ending its practice of holding annual summits, a move that could avoid a potentially tense encounter with U.S. President Donald Trump in his final year in office. The frequency of NATO summits has varied over the alliance's 77-year history, but its leaders have met every summer since 2021. Some diplomats and analysts have long argued that annual summits create pressure for eye-catching results that distracts from longer-term planning, with one diplomat saying 'better to have fewer summits than bad summits'. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 路透社：北约正在考虑结束举行年度峰会的做法，此举可以避免在唐纳德·特朗普总统任期最后一年与其进行潜在的紧张会晤。北约峰会的频率在其77年的历史中各不相同，但自2021年以来，其领导人每年夏天都会会晤。一些外交官和分析人士长期以来一直认为，年度峰会会产生对引人注目的成果的压力，从而分散了对长期规划的注意力，一位外交官表示‘与其举行糟糕的峰会，不如少开几次峰会’。 @wfwitness

text: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Zionist Lapdog Anwar Gargash: “Iran is acting like a superpower, even without nuclear weapons. Imagine if it had such weapons.” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 犹太复国主义走狗安瓦尔·加尔加什：“伊朗表现得像个超级大国，即使没有核武器。想象一下如果它拥有这种武器会怎样。” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike between the town of Yater and the city of Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike on Touline and another airstrike targeted Kounin, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列对黎巴嫩南部亚特镇和宾特朱拜勒市之间进行了空袭。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列对黎巴嫩南部图林进行了空袭，另一次空袭针对库宁。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Зачистка Озерного 📝 обстановка на Славянском направлении Российские войска постепенно берут под контроль левый берег Северского Донца . Леса на этом участке фронта долгое время использовались ВСУ для накопления личного состава, и за годы боёв противник оборудовал в сеть опорных пунктов. ➡️ Днем 27 апреля подразделения 25 армии освободили Озерное (Ильичовку) и подняли над ним государственные флаги. После закрепления на территории населенного пункта российские бойцы смогут установить огневой контроль над этим участком реки, вдоль которого ранее члены ВСУ регулярно предпринимали контратаки в сторону Закотного . Тем не менее в окрестных лесах все еще сохраняется обширная «серая зона», через которую противник пытается забросить в тыл российских подразделений малые группы пехоты. ➡️ Большая их часть оперативно выявляется и уничтожается операторами БЛА, однако отдельным членам украинских формирований все же удаётся укрыться в «лисьих норах» и руинах застройки. Порою их присутствие фиксируется даже в районе Ямполя . Сами по себе серьезной угрозы они не представляют, однако способны координировать удары беспилотников и организовывать засады на группы снабжения. ➡️ На противоположном берегу реки продолжаются бои на территории Кривой Луки . Освобождение Озерного упростит дальнейший штурм этого села, однако географические особенности местности не позволят полноценно закрепиться на его территории. Уверенный контроль над ним станет возможным лишь после зачистки расположенных на возвышенностях опорных пунктов противника. 📌 Поэтому основную роль в продвижении российских войск играют скоординированные действия расчетов беспилотников и артиллерии. Они способны обеспечить изоляцию позиций ВСУ от снабжения и резервов, «размягчить» оборону противника и упростить продвижение штурмовиков. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #карта #Россия #Славянск #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 清理奥泽尔诺耶 📝 斯拉维扬斯克方向局势 俄罗斯军队正逐渐控制北顿涅茨河左岸。该前线区域的森林长期以来一直被乌克兰武装部队用于集结人员，多年战斗中，敌方已将其装备成据点网络。 ➡️ 4月27日白天，第25集团军部队解放了奥泽尔诺耶（伊利乔夫卡）并升起了国旗。在控制该定居点后，俄罗斯士兵将能够对该河段实施火力控制，乌克兰武装部队此前经常沿该河段向扎科特诺耶方向发动反击。然而，周边森林中仍存在大片“灰色地带”，敌方正试图通过该区域向俄罗斯部队后方派遣小股步兵。 ➡️ 其中大部分被无人机操作员迅速发现并消灭，但仍有部分乌克兰武装人员成功躲藏在“狐狸洞”和废墟中。有时甚至在扬波尔地区也记录到了他们的存在。他们本身不构成严重威胁，但能够协调无人机打击并组织针对补给小组的伏击。 ➡️ 在河对岸，克里瓦亚卢卡地区的战斗仍在继续。解放奥泽尔诺耶将简化对该村庄的后续突击，但地理特征将不允许完全巩固阵地。只有在清理位于高地的敌方据点后，才能实现对其的稳固控制。 📌 因此，无人机和炮兵部队的协调行动在俄罗斯军队的推进中发挥了主要作用。他们能够确保切断乌克兰武装部队阵地的补给和预备队，削弱敌方防御并简化突击部队的推进。如果您有关于局势的补充信息，或者希望我们报道您部队的成就，您可以随时通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 给我们留言。 📍 高清地图 📍 英文版 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #地图 #俄罗斯 #斯拉维扬斯克 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列对黎巴嫩南部亚特镇和宾特朱拜勒市之间进行了空袭。 @wfwitness

text: White House: Those who constantly falsely label and slander Trump as a fascist and a threat to democracy are fueling this kind of violence.
text_zh: 白宫：那些不断错误地给特朗普贴上法西斯主义者和民主威胁标签并进行诽谤的人，正在助长这种暴力行为。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇷🇺🇮🇷 Russian President Putin told Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi that he hopes Iran will overcome its current challenges under the leadership of the new Supreme Leader. “We see that the Iranian people are bravely defending their independence and…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Araghchi described his lengthy meeting with Russian President Putin as very positive. During the more than an hour and a half meeting the two covered bilateral relations, regional developments, the ongoing conflict with the U.S. and Israel against Iran. Araghchi added that there are now very good grounds for further cooperation and said Iran intends to continue its strategic relations and partnership with Russia under the new conditions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇷🇺🇮🇷 俄罗斯总统普京告诉伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希，他希望伊朗在新任最高领袖的领导下能够克服当前的挑战。“我们看到伊朗人民正在勇敢地捍卫他们的独立，并且……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿拉格希形容他与俄罗斯总统普京的长时间会晤非常积极。在超过一个半小时的会晤中，双方讨论了双边关系、地区局势，以及伊朗与美国和以色列之间持续的冲突。阿拉格希补充说，目前进一步合作的基础非常好，并表示伊朗打算在新条件下继续与俄罗斯保持战略关系和伙伴关系。@wfwitness

text: White House: Trump is fearless; he is willing to put his own life on the line.
text_zh: 白宫：特朗普无所畏惧；他愿意拿自己的生命去冒险。

text: 🇺🇸 "No one gets as many assassination attempts as Trump! Truly exceptional" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “没有人像特朗普那样遭遇过这么多次暗杀企图！真是非同寻常” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: White House: Trump's calm in the face of chaos, while yet another individual was trying to take his life, was really remarkable to witness.
text_zh: 白宫：在混乱面前，当另一个人试图夺走他的生命时，特朗普表现出的冷静确实令人瞩目。

text: White House: This is the third major assassination attempt against Trump in two years. No other president in history has faced such repeated serious attempts on his life.
text_zh: 白宫：这是两年来针对特朗普的第三次重大暗杀企图。历史上没有任何其他总统曾面临过如此多次严重的生命威胁。

text: JD Vance’s Top Donor Peter Thiel Suggests Pope Leo XIV Is Linked to the Antichrist Leaked lecture suggests Peter Thiel has been promoting a very unconventional worldview, mixing tech optimism with apocalyptic religion, and even told JD Vance to “ignore the pope on moral questions” and just “pray for him.” In those lectures, Thiel reportedly framed the Antichrist not as a traditional evil figure, but as someone who tries to stop technological progress. He warned about “legionnaires of the Antichrist”, including people pushing limits on AI or climate policy. He even mentioned Pope Leo XIV in that discussion. The bigger concern is influence: Thiel helped fund Vance’s political rise (about $15 million) and sees him as a “generational bet.” SOURCE
text_zh: JD·万斯的主要捐助者彼得·蒂尔暗示教皇利奥十四世与敌基督有关。泄露的讲座表明，彼得·蒂尔一直在推广一种非常规的世界观，将技术乐观主义与末日宗教混合在一起，甚至告诉JD·万斯“在道德问题上忽略教皇”，只需“为他祈祷”。在这些讲座中，据报道蒂尔将敌基督定义为不是一个传统的邪恶人物，而是一个试图阻止技术进步的人。他警告了“敌基督的军团”，包括那些推动人工智能或气候政策限制的人。他甚至在讨论中提到了教皇利奥十四世。更大的担忧是影响力：蒂尔帮助资助了万斯的政治崛起（约1500万美元），并将他视为一场“代际赌注”。来源

text: Open Source Intel Iran told intermediaries it still seeks to maintain control over the Strait of Hormuz. - WSJ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048809202806669409/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗告诉中间人，它仍寻求保持对霍尔木兹海峡的控制。 - 华尔街日报 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048809202806669409/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix That anyone in Berlin thought this would be over in days is just mind numbing stuff. Seriously. Failure of assessment by whoever provided it. Breaking 🚨 : Merz says "disillusioned" with US and Israel over Iran. "At this point I am disillusioned simply because the US and Israel claimed at the beginning that they could solve this problem within days. Now I must recognize: It is not solved." Said Germany and EU also have "own European ideas on how to get to a resolution of the conflict." Will continue own diplomatic efforts in coordination with US. This was the second public criticism of US by Merz in one day. Earlier Merz said about US in Iran: "an entire nation is being humiliated by the Iranian leadership". - Michaela Kuefner tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯：柏林竟然有人认为这几天就能结束，这简直令人麻木。说真的。提供此评估的人评估失误。突发 🚨：梅尔茨表示对美国和以色列在伊朗问题上感到“幻灭”。“在这一点上，我感到幻灭，仅仅是因为美国和以色列最初声称他们可以在几天内解决这个问题。现在我必须承认：它没有解决。”他说德国和欧盟也有“关于如何解决冲突的欧洲自己的想法”。将继续在与美国协调的情况下进行自己的外交努力。这是梅尔茨一天内第二次公开批评美国。早些时候，梅尔茨在谈到美国在伊朗的问题时说：“整个国家正在被伊朗领导层羞辱”。 - 米凯拉·库夫纳推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran FM Araghchi; Mr. Putin said that not only Russia, but now the whole world is admiring the people of Iran; for their steadfastness against America and for their victory in this unequal and unjust war. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048808337915949512/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗外长阿拉格希；普京先生说，不仅是俄罗斯，现在全世界都在钦佩伊朗人民；钦佩他们对美国的坚定立场，以及他们在这一不平等和不公正战争中的胜利。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048808337915949512/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The Atlantic: In closed-door meetings, Vice President Vance has repeatedly questioned Pentagon assessments of the war with Iran and whether U.S. missile stockpiles have been significantly depleted, raised concerns about the accuracy of information provided by the War Department. Officials are worried that reduced stockpiles could weaken U.S. readiness in potential future conflicts involving Taiwan, South Korea or Europe. A former U.S. official reports that Secretary of War Hegseth strives to tell U.S. President Trump what he wants to hear, as his tenure of the position seems increasingly reliant on Trump’s favour. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 大西洋月刊：在闭门会议中，副总统万斯多次质疑五角大楼对伊朗战争的评估，以及美国的导弹库存是否已大幅耗尽，并对战争部提供的信息的准确性提出了担忧。官员们担心库存减少可能会削弱美国在未来涉及台湾、韩国或欧洲的潜在冲突中的准备状态。一位前美国官员报告称，战争部长赫格塞斯努力告诉美国总统特朗普他想听的话，因为他担任该职位的任期似乎越来越依赖特朗普的青睐。@wfwitness

text: French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot: There will be no lasting solution to this crisis unless the Iranian regime agrees to major concessions and a radical change in posture, allowing peaceful coexistence with its regional environment and enabling the Iranian people to freely build their own future.
text_zh: 法国外交部长让-诺埃尔·巴罗：除非伊朗政权同意做出重大让步并彻底改变立场，允许与其地区环境和平共处，并使伊朗人民能够自由地建设自己的未来，否则这场危机将不会有持久的解决方案。

text: New attack between Zawtar and Maifadoun
text_zh: 扎塔尔和迈法敦之间发生新的袭击
